title: SimpleMOTD
description: Change the Message of the Day with just one Command !
body:
# SimpleMOTD
A lightweight yet powerful MOTD plugin for Spigot/Paper Minecraft servers with ingame editing, centering module, and persistent YAML storage.

## Features
- Ingame editing: edit MOTD directly from chat
- Add, remove, or modify lines on the fly
- Real-time preview before applying changes
- Center module to automatically center text
- %placeholders% for dynamic content
- Configurable max lines limit
- Automatic YAML storage
- Reload-safe configuration
- Version tracking
- Granular command permissions
- Admin-only reload capability
- Help command accessible to all

## Commands
**Main command:** /motd
